name: Cash Time Loan Centers
description_short: Cash Time Loan Centers offers title loans, personal loans, and registration loans with same-day funding at their Phoenix location. They serve customers with poor credit or no credit history.
description_long:
Cash Time Loan Centers operates a physical location in South Phoenix at 2030 W. Baseline Rd., serving the South Mountain, Laveen, and surrounding communities. The company specializes in emergency cash lending products designed for individuals facing immediate financial needs. Their storefront is conveniently located in the South Mountain Pavilion shopping center near household retailers and services, making it accessible for walk-in applications.

The company offers three primary loan products: Title Loans (using vehicle titles as collateral), Personal Loans, and Registration Loans, all designed with flexible repayment terms. They explicitly serve customers with poor credit, those rebuilding credit, and those with no credit history at all. Cash Time advertises competitive rates, no hidden fees, and flexible repayment options. For existing customers with high-interest debt elsewhere, they offer Title Loan Buyouts to refinance at lower rates. Loan applications can be completed in-person, online, or via their mobile portal, with same-day funding available for approved customers.

Cash Time distinguishes itself through multiple funding delivery methods (walk-out cash or direct deposit), a 24/7 online account management portal for checking balances and scheduling payments, bilingual support (English/Spanish), and extended hours including Saturday availability (10 AM–4 PM). Their location strategy emphasizes convenience by co-locating with established retailers. The company markets itself on personalized service, with loan specialists available to discuss solutions tailored to individual financial situations.

As a title loan and emergency cash lender, Cash Time operates in a sector characterized by higher interest rates and shorter repayment terms than traditional bank loans. While the website emphasizes flexibility and accessibility for credit-challenged borrowers, potential customers should understand that title loans carry vehicle repossession risk and that APRs are likely substantial, though not disclosed on the website. The company's focus on quick funding for emergency situations indicates suitability for short-term cash gaps rather than long-term financial solutions.
pros: Same-day funding available with instant approval for qualified applicants
Multiple application methods: in-person, online, or direct deposit option for faster disbursement
Serves customers with poor credit, no credit, or credit-building needs without apparent credit score minimums
Title Loan Buyout program explicitly helps refinance high-interest loans from other lenders at lower rates
24/7 online account management portal for checking balances, scheduling payments, and accessing additional funds
No hidden fees policy stated on website
Extended hours including Saturday (10 AM–4 PM) and bilingual English/Spanish support
Convenient location in established shopping center with ample nearby retailers and services
cons: Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating repossession risk if payments are missed
APR and interest rate information not disclosed on website, preventing informed comparison shopping
Physical location serves only one Phoenix area; no online-only or multi-state lending option mentioned
Emergency cash product category typically features higher rates and shorter terms than alternatives like personal loans
No mention of credit reporting to bureaus, limiting potential credit-building benefit for customers
best_for: South Phoenix residents needing immediate cash with vehicle title as collateral
Individuals with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional bank loans
Borrowers seeking to refinance high-interest loans from other lenders at lower rates through Title Loan Buyout
Spanish-speaking consumers who prefer bilingual financial services and support
diagnosis: Cash Time Loan Centers is best for South Phoenix residents facing immediate financial emergencies who have vehicle collateral and cannot qualify for traditional bank loans due to poor or absent credit history. The primary caveat is that title loans carry repossession risk and undisclosed APRs that are typically high; customers should carefully assess whether they can meet payment obligations before pledging vehicle titles.
services: Registration Loans (collateral-based loans using vehicle registration)
Title Loan Buyouts (refinancing existing high-interest loans)
Direct deposit funding to bank accounts
24/7 online account portal for balance checks and payment scheduling
Flexible repayment terms customized to borrower budget
